name: Biloxi-Style Appetizer Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Fresh lemon juice or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a spice bag and boil in beer/water mixture in a large saucepan.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except for shrimp and butter. Simmer for 10 minutes to blend flavors.
3. Arrange shrimp in an oven-proof casserole dish.
4. Pour liquid over the shrimp.
5. Pour melted butter over all.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes, stirring twice.
